metadata.name: Check Status of a Factory Order

description: A customer who placed a factory order for a new vehicle is calling to get a status update.

nodes.task_description: Get the customer's order number or name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the customer's order details.

nodes.task_description: Check the vehicle's status in the production pipeline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the vehicle's status is 'In Production - Paint Shop'.

nodes.task_description: Provide the customer with the current status and the estimated completion and delivery dates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the customer of the current stage and the estimated delivery window.
